overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player navigates wet neon-lit streets, passes under overpasses, and crosses intersections in a futuristic cyberpunk urban environment with heavy neon signage and reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit intersection with crosswalk and traffic bollards

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the Continental hotel sign and skyscrapers
camera turns right onto the sidewalk and begins walking

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection, looking up at the towering buildings, then turning right to walk along the sidewalk

entered.detail: reflective wet pavement with neon reflections
bold yellow stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
short black and yellow posts lining the crosswalk
illuminated blue signage on the side of a tall building
multi-level highway overpass with glowing lights

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a rain-slicked intersection in Night City, with the camera panning up to reveal the illuminated Continental hotel sign towering above. The player then turns right onto the sidewalk, passing traffic bollards and beginning their walk through the neon-drenched urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk lined with digital billboards and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past illuminated advertisements and storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign reading 'PHARMACEUTICALS' on building corner
massive curved wall covered in glowing digital advertisements
yellow textured paving stones along the sidewalk edge
tall palm trees lining the street with neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the open sidewalk, passing the glowing Pharmaceuticals sign and a massive curved digital billboard wall. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights overhead as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and palm trees line the left side of the street.

events.description: approaching the corner with the liquor store and entering the underpass area

agents.ego_description: walking past the corner liquor store toward the darker underpass entrance

entered.detail: red neon sign with iguana logo reading 'MALTED IGUANA LIQUORS'
concrete wall covered in white graffiti tags
thick concrete pillars supporting the highway above

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a corner dominated by the red neon Malted Iguana Liquors sign. The environment transitions from the open street to a more enclosed area as the player enters the underpass, with concrete walls covered in graffiti and support columns visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under highway overpass with shop fronts

events.description: entering the darker underpass with artificial neon lighting replacing ambient city light
passing neon-lit shop fronts and advertisements under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass past illuminated shop signs and advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction under the overpass

entered.detail: underside of the highway structure with exposed beams and pipes
illuminated overhead sign reading 'CITY CENTER' with arrow
large monochrome digital screen showing cola advertisement
circular green neon sign reading 'OPEN' on shop front
large circular industrial ventilation fan on building wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters the darker underpass beneath the highway, where artificial neon lighting dominates. The concrete ceiling of the overpass looms overhead with a 'CITY CENTER' sign visible in the distance. The player passes shop fronts including one with a green 'OPEN' neon sign and a large cola advertisement screen, while the environment remains enclosed and sheltered from the open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalk and active traffic

events.description: crossing the street as cars pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while vehicles drive through the crossing

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection
waiting at the crosswalk corner for traffic to pass

entered.detail: bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
illuminated sign for 'EDDIES' on building facade
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the player enters a major intersection marked by yellow crosswalk stripes. The player crosses the street while a black car drives through the intersection and other pedestrians wait at the corner. The Eddies building sign is visible on the left as the player continues across the wet pavement reflecting the surrounding neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from open, rain-slicked streets into a sheltered underpass before emerging back into a bustling city intersection. It begins at a wet intersection, panning up toward the towering Continental hotel sign before turning right to walk past traffic bollards and glowing pharmaceutical advertisements. As the camera moves along the sidewalk, the open vista of palm trees and massive digital billboards shifts toward a more enclosed environment, passing the red neon of Malted Iguana Liquors and entering a concrete underpass. The scene then descends into the darker, graffiti-covered space beneath the highway, where artificial neon lights and a City Center sign illuminate shop fronts and cola advertisements. Finally, the camera exits the sheltered overpass and crosses a major intersection marked by yellow stripes, moving past the Eddies building as the wet pavement reflects the surrounding city lights.
